tasks.title: Update trunk firewall spec law for opt-in enforcement
tasks.verification: Updated rq-twf01 to define worktree_guard_enforce opt-in semantics and added asset test locking flag-off/strict scenarios. Checkpoint cdc371f.
tasks.summary: Added plugin/src/trunk-write-firewall-spec-assets.test.ts to enforce rq-twf01 opt-in wording. Updated .adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json so flag omitted/false allows trunk file/destructive bash writes, while strict true blocks and preserves exceptions.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added plugin/src/trunk-write-firewall-spec-assets.test.ts to enforce rq-twf01 opt-in wording. Updated .adv/specs/advance-meta/spec.json so flag omitted/false allows trunk file/destructive bash writes, while strict true blocks and preserves exceptions.

tasks.title: Add typed effective worktree guard feature default
tasks.verification: Added explicit typed worktree_guard_enforce default and shared stability feature default helper. Status now uses shared helper. Checkpoint 2eaec7a.
tasks.summary: Added worktree_guard_enforce: false to FeatureFlagsSchema, exported withStabilityFeatureDefaults from types, moved status feature defaulting to the shared helper, and added src/types/project.test.ts coverage for default/preserved values.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added worktree_guard_enforce: false to FeatureFlagsSchema, exported withStabilityFeatureDefaults from types, moved status feature defaulting to the shared helper, and added src/types/project.test.ts coverage for default/preserved values.

tasks.title: Gate trunk write firewall in tool execution hook
tasks.verification: Gated trunk firewall hook behind effective worktree_guard_enforce and added integration coverage for default allow, strict block, strict worktree allow, destructive bash, git command allowance, and malformed config fail-closed. Checkpoint b93c543.
tasks.summary: Imported loadProjectConfig and withStabilityFeatureDefaults into plugin init, computed trunkWriteFirewallEnforced once near initialization, skipped file/bash firewall checks when false, and fail-closed on config read/parse errors. Updated integration tests to cover omitted flag allowance, true flag blocking, strict worktree exception, and malformed config.
tasks.implementation_summary: Imported loadProjectConfig and withStabilityFeatureDefaults into plugin init, computed trunkWriteFirewallEnforced once near initialization, skipped file/bash firewall checks when false, and fail-closed on config read/parse errors. Updated integration tests to cover omitted flag allowance, true flag blocking, strict worktree exception, and malformed config.

tasks.title: Opt Advance repo into strict worktree enforcement
tasks.verification: Advance project now opts into strict worktree enforcement via root project.json, with a spec asset regression test. Checkpoint 83fa4d8.
tasks.summary: Added project.json features.worktree_guard_enforce: true so the Advance repo preserves strict trunk/default checkout blocking. Added trunk-write-firewall spec asset coverage that parses root project.json and requires the opt-in flag to remain true.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added project.json features.worktree_guard_enforce: true so the Advance repo preserves strict trunk/default checkout blocking. Added trunk-write-firewall spec asset coverage that parses root project.json and requires the opt-in flag to remain true.

tasks.title: Update strict-mode docs and instruction surfaces
tasks.verification: Docs now state opt-in trunk firewall behavior, strict-mode enablement, flag-off allowance, git-command exception, and Advance repo strict opt-in. Checkpoint 569535b.
tasks.summary: Updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, docs/worktree-guide.md, and docs/temporal-recovery.md to explain that trunk write firewall enforcement is opt-in through worktree_guard_enforce, that omitted/false allows default-checkout file and classified destructive bash writes, and that strict mode is explicit. Added docs asset tests with whitespace-normalized phrase checks for the opt-in markers and Advance repo strict-mode anchor.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS, docs/worktree-guide.md, and docs/temporal-recovery.md to explain that trunk write firewall enforcement is opt-in through worktree_guard_enforce, that omitted/false allows default-checkout file and classified destructive bash writes, and that strict mode is explicit. Added docs asset tests with whitespace-normalized phrase checks for the opt-in markers and Advance repo strict-mode anchor.

tasks.title: Run final verification for trunk firewall opt-in policy
tasks.verification: Harden remediation completed. Verification passed: targeted harden regression tests, pnpm run check, pnpm test, pnpm run build. Checkpoint 4e00142.
tasks.summary: Hardened trunk firewall and release docs after scanner findings. Git root detection now fails closed for protected checkout paths, repoState not_git blocks protected checkout writes, redirect parsing handles quoted/no-space targets, integration tests cover edit/morph_edit and explicit false, store init asserts worktree_guard_enforce false, specs use features.worktree_guard_enforce, and reload docs require build before OpenCode restart.
tasks.implementation_summary: Hardened trunk firewall and release docs after scanner findings. Git root detection now fails closed for protected checkout paths, repoState not_git blocks protected checkout writes, redirect parsing handles quoted/no-space targets, integration tests cover edit/morph_edit and explicit false, store init asserts worktree_guard_enforce false, specs use features.worktree_guard_enforce, and reload docs require build before OpenCode restart.

wisdom.content: For spec-law changes with no existing drift assertion, add a narrow asset test that reads `.adv/specs/*/spec.json` directly from repo source and asserts the requirement wording/scenario anchors before editing the spec. This gives a concrete RED for prose/spec contract updates.

Feature flags that start as passthrough config can still be live policy. Once a flag controls hook behavior, add it to `FeatureFlagsSchema` and export a shared effective-default helper so `adv_status` and runtime hooks cannot drift via duplicate ad-hoc defaulting.

For hook-level safety flags, compute the effective policy once at plugin initialization rather than inside every tool call. For malformed/unreadable project config, fail closed for safety-critical hooks and log the diagnostic; otherwise omitted/false config should follow the documented default.
For docs asset tests that assert prose requirements, normalize whitespace before phrase assertions. This lets docs be wrapped/formatted naturally while still locking critical user-facing semantics.

proposal.approval_evidence: User confirmed problem statement and replied `continue` to completed proposal summary. Proposal includes scope, success criteria, discovery agenda, and clean B/F/S scan.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings recorded, agreement.md persisted, and user approved acceptance criteria with reply `approve`. Contract items are represented in agreement sections for objectives, AC, constraints, avoidances, and decisions.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Independent validator returned CAUTION; cautions resolved in design via explicit config-failure behavior/tests and required spec-first implementation. No unresolved CONFLICT, no user-value tradeoff, no contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan with reply `approve`. Six-task graph created with TDD intent and dependencies; validation passed with only expected NO_DELTAS warning until spec task executes.

execution.approval_evidence: All six planned tasks completed with checkpoint commits. Final verification passed: pnpm run check, pnpm test, pnpm run build. Worktree clean.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply `accept`. Review verdict APPROVED; blockers/issues fixed and re-verified; acceptance criteria all satisfied; final verification passed.

release.approval_evidence: User provided Tier B archive sign-off with exact reply `sign off`. Harden status READY; conformance state has no required specs; validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning; verification passed before archive.

clarify_findings.message: Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
